Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x83E0 "ABYSS-0400-83CB" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Abyss.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0400 which copies 256 bytes of data from $0420 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400. This allows the game to run correctly.
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $7E25. However the true start address is $83CB.
